name: Gmail
description: Read, search, draft, and send Gmail messages through the official Gmail REST API using the connected Google account.

toolDeclarations.name: list_gmail_messages
toolDeclarations.description: Search or list Gmail messages. Use this when the user asks to check inbox, unread mail, latest email, or find emails matching a query.

query.description: Gmail search query, e.g. from:john newer_than:7d, is:unread, subject:invoice.

limit.description: Maximum messages to show, up to 20.

toolDeclarations.name: read_gmail_message
toolDeclarations.description: Read a Gmail message by id or by searching for the newest matching message.

query.description: Optional Gmail search query to find the newest matching message when messageId is not known.

toolDeclarations.name: send_gmail_email
toolDeclarations.description: Send an email from the connected Gmail account. Only use when the user explicitly asks to send an email and provides recipient, subject, and body.

to.description: Recipient email address, or comma-separated addresses.

toolDeclarations.name: create_gmail_draft
toolDeclarations.description: Create a Gmail draft instead of sending. Use this when the user wants to review an email before sending.

to.description: Recipient email address, or comma-separated addresses.
